---
title: "Papers"
pagetitle: "Papers — Working Papers in Critical Search"
description: "All published working papers."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
listing:
  id: papers-list
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  template: ../_listing-paper-row.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="wpcs-wrap wpcs-masthead">
  <div class="wpcs-masthead__grid">
    <div class="wpcs-micro">All papers<br>Issue №&nbsp;001</div>
    <div>
      <h1 class="wpcs-page-h1">Papers</h1>
      <p class="wpcs-lead">
        Every paper is a standalone Quarto notebook with a permanent DOI.
        Browse the full list below.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="wpcs-masthead__vlabel">VOL.I · PRINTING 01 · 2026</div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="wpcs-wrap wpcs-section">
  <div class="wpcs-row">
    <div class="wpcs-micro">Index</div>
    <div>
```

::: {#papers-list}
:::

```{=html}
      <div class="wpcs-empty" id="wpcs-empty-state" hidden>
        <p class="wpcs-lead" style="max-width: 680px;">
          No papers published yet. <em>Building Working Papers in Critical Search</em>
          by the editors publishes at launch; two further papers follow shortly after.
        </p>
        <p class="wpcs-small-mono" style="margin-top: 20px;">
          <a href="../submit.html" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink, #1a1a2e);">Submit your own →</a>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
<script>
  (function () {
    var list = document.getElementById("papers-list");
    var empty = document.getElementById("wpcs-empty-state");
    if (!list || !empty) return;
    var hasItems = list.querySelector(".list, .quarto-listing, .card, .row, .wpcs-paper-list");
    if (!hasItems) empty.hidden = false;
  })();
</script>
```
